title: updater-docker plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the updater-docker semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_FILE.description: Path to the Dockerfile to update.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_IMAGE.description: Optional image name filter. Only matching FROM lines are updated.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_REGISTRY.description: Optional registry prefix used when matching image references.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
